NOTE-->this matter can not go forward on the 4/2/18 calendar as that calendar is being heard by a visiting judge and all prior hearings have been before Judge Busch. In addition, 4/11 is the first available date for Judge Busch and there is another petition on that date. No later than Friday, April 6, 2018, file stamped courtesy copies of all filings on 3/26/18 must be delivered to the examiner in Room 202. Please note, as this is a contested matter, ex parte communications with the examiner are not appropriate.
